title: Khara Subs for 333
wikitext:
[]: Khara Subs for 3.33?             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Dec 23, 2014 5:43 pm Sorry if you guys have heard of this already, but this interesting bit of information just showed up on my Facebook wall: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Khara Subs for 3.33?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 23, 2014 5:51 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Is there any confirmation of this anywhere else?

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Dec 23, 2014 6:04 pm Besides that this is a bit useful as Funimation says they are still working on a release date. Maybe we will get one soon.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Dec 23, 2014 6:30 pm Guess I didn't see that post way back when. I've been more of a lurker since I started school again back in September 2013, after all.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Dec 23, 2014 6:47 pm Funi posted this on twitter today in an effort to pass this on as news as most people aren't following every devloment. It ticked me off tbh.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Dec 23, 2014 6:54 pm Sicarius VI wrote: Besides that this is a bit useful as Funimation says they are still working on a release date.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Dec 23, 2014 7:05 pm I saw the same FB post. It was... cute? At first I thought they were telling me that there was going to be a special announcement regarding 3.33’s US release during the Toonami screening, but upon actually reading the post it was clear that they were only reminding us of stuff and things that they had told us once before.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 23, 2014 7:25 pm That theory of Funimation 3.33 DVD/BD alongside VIZ's Volume 14 manga in February is looking more and more likely... Wouldn't be the first time, with 3.0's Japanese premiere the same month the Volume 13 manga was out.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Dec 23, 2014 7:28 pm It's getting pretty tight for BD production for February delivery if they haven't yet fixed a date, I would have thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Tue Dec 23, 2014 7:49 pm

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Dec 23, 2014 7:53 pm And now Crunchyroll and ANN are picking it up like its a brand new story! Nothing has changed since summer!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 23, 2014 7:59 pm I guess most folks couldn't be bothered to watch that video. Geez, if I'd thought it was a damned news item maybe I would have made an actual post back then, but it didn't seem to warrant it. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 23, 2014 8:36 pm TumblingDown's post merged to this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17039/Khara-Subs-for-333/ We already got news about this waaay back in August. It's absolutely nothing new (sadly): http://forum.evageeks.org/post/750147/Official-Rebuild-Dub-Thread/#750147

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Dec 23, 2014 10:10 pm Funi needs to learn old news is old or this could be their way of saying no 3.33 preview after 2.22 airs on Toonami

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Dec 24, 2014 2:26 am I know the pre-order cancellation/delay has been a real hassle for Funi, but I really hope they put in this same kind of effort if/when they get the rights to NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Dec 24, 2014 4:44 am Well Khara's translation department seems to go with the "one-word-per-day" policy. Bets are on, what's first? News for Final, or an American release date for Q?

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Wed Dec 24, 2014 6:41 am hui43210 wrote: And now Crunchyroll and ANN are picking it up like its a brand new story! Nothing has changed since summer!

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Dec 24, 2014 7:13 pm Hm. That should shed some light on controversal lines like "Just die!/go down quietly", "You may think that way but the other don't" and whatever Sakura said.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:14 pm robersora wrote: Well Khara's translation department seems to go with the "one-word-per-day" policy. Bets are on, what's first? News for Final, or an American release date for Q?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:20 pm I hope they redo the series and EoE and get rid of Jive Hyuga and have New Ritsuko and New Rei instead of the old ones. I don't like Winn Lee's Rei anymore and New Ritsuko has a husky sexy voice. Old Ritsuko sounds like my caustic aunt, who is not sexy at all. I don't have any sexy aunts. I have a sexy cousin but she's an asshole. What I'm saying is that they need to redub the originals because the Rebuild cast is better. Also on my wishlist: Replace Asuka. Spike can stay.

[]: Re: Khara Subs for 3.33?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 23, 2014 5:51 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Is there any confirmation of this anywhere else?
